_comment: SDD v5 hooks. Les hooks git donnent du feedback rapide mais l'orchestrateur est la source de vérité — toutes ces vérifications sont rejouées à /build, /validate, /review, /ship. Les hooks --no-verify ne compromettent pas la qualité finale, juste la vélocité du feedback.

PreToolUse._comment: G1 security: block debug artifacts before committing

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "*.jsx" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -l "console\.log\|console\.debug\|debugger" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ debug-artifacts: Remove debug artifacts before committing"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ debug-artifacts: clean"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: G1 security: block incomplete code markers

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "*.jsx" "*.py" "*.rs" "*.go" "*.java" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -ln "TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ incomplete-code: Resolve TODO/FIXME markers before committing"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ incomplete-code: clean"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "*.jsx" "*.py" "*.rs" "*.go" "*.java" "*.yaml" "*.yml" "*.json" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -l "password\s*=\s*[\x27\"]\|api_key\s*=\s*[\x27\"]\|secret\s*=\s*[\x27\"]\|token\s*=\s*[\x27\"]" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "❌ hardcoded-secrets: Never hardcode secrets. Use environment variables."; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "✅ hardcoded-secrets: clean"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: Pre-commit: ORACLE comment evaluation (check_oracle_assertions.py) — v5 evaluates the math, not just presence
Pre-commit: Design System conformity (check_ds_conformity.py) — UI files only
Pre-push: test tampering AST diff across branch (check_test_tampering.py --scan-branch)
Pre-push: RED phase trivia scan across branch
Pre-push: Git Flow — block PRs targeting main unless from release/*

hooks.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -q "^release/"; then echo "✅ pr-base-branch-guard: release branch — main target allowed"; exit 0; fi; ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "\-\-base[= ]main"; then echo "❌ pr-base-branch-guard: PRs MUST target develop, not main."; exit 1; fi; if ! echo "$ARGS" | grep -q "\-\-base"; then echo "❌ pr-base-branch-guard: --base flag missing. Use --base develop explicitly."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ pr-base-branch-guard: PR targets integration branch"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: Git Flow: block direct push to main

hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "(origin|upstream)\s+main|\smain:|\smain$"; then echo "❌ push-to-main-guard: Direct push to main is FORBIDDEN."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ push-to-main-guard: not pushing to main"; exit 0'

PreToolUse._comment: Git Flow: warn when branching from main

hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_command"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "origin/main|\smain$"; then echo "❌ branch-origin-guard: Feature branches must be created from origin/develop."; exit 1; fi; echo "✅ branch-origin-guard: branch origin OK"; exit 0'

PostToolUse._comment: Post-edit feedback: DS hardcoded colors on tsx files

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then FOUND=$(grep -n "blue-[0-9]\|red-[0-9]\|green-[0-9]\|yellow-[0-9]\|gray-[0-9]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "⚠️ hardcoded-colors: Use DS tokens instead of hardcoded color classes"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'

PostToolUse._comment: Post-edit feedback: debug artifacts in python files

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then FOUND=$(grep -n "print(.*DEBUG\|breakpoint()\|import pdb" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "⚠️ debug-artifacts: Remove debug artifacts before committing"; echo "$FOUND"; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'
